generated_oml:
instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed with 214×214×3 mm dimensions, controlled via MOSFETs handling up to 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]

instance TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital temperature sensor with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy in -10°C to +85°C range"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital temperature sensor with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy in -10°C to +85°C range"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital temperature sensor with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy in -10°C to +85°C range"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance StyrofoamInsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for high-current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit"
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor1, TemperatureSensor2, TemperatureSensor3
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQMessageBroker, PythonScipy
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Energy balance model between air and environment with 2 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal inertia model including heatbed with 4 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data transmission on Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService, CalibrationService
]

instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python with Scipy optimization library for numerical computations"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire protocol for sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for hardware/software specifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelBasedPrediction
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms using non-linear least squares optimization (Scipy)"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationUpdate
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyStatus, PerformanceStatus
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection service for system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation service for system internal conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateEstimation
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services for control parameter adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatingDuration
]

instance ModelBasedPrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model-based temperature predictions informing control decisions"
]

instance SafetyStatus : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety status monitoring for system integrity"
]

instance PerformanceStatus : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal performance status monitoring"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of system faults or anomalies"
]

instance SystemStateEstimation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated internal state of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance AdjustHeatingDuration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting heating duration based on temperature trends"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CalibrationUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updating model parameters using calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates these into electrical signals for the heatbed (via MOSFETs) and fan."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized system where RabbitMQ facilitates communication between the Raspberry Pi-based controller, low-level driver, and hardware components (sensors/actuators), with simulation models running in the virtual layer to interact with the physical twin."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is integrated during the 'as operated' phase, as the document states 'Once the system is deployed, the models used to build it should not be discarded. Instead, they should be integrated into a Digital Twin.'"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated by comparing simulated outputs with experimental data; Assumption 1 (uniform temperature) tested via sensor placement experiments; Model B showed better prediction of thermal inertia due to including heatbed heat accumulation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data exchange over TCP/IP, 1-Wire bus for sensor communication, GPIO pins on Raspberry Pi for interfacing with hardware components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and all software components (controller, low-level driver) deployed on the Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with open-source code available in a GitHub repository."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety, and PCB design uses optocouplers for electrical isolation between control signals and high-current circuits to prevent unsafe states."
]
